titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Said Al-Naqqash

text: ه عن سعيد النقّاش فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن الحسين السعدآباديّ، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد اللّه البرقيّ عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن سعيد النقّاش‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Said Al-Naqqash has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Al-Husayn Al-Sadabadi, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah Al-Barqi, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Said Al-Naqqash.
